# Phalnx
> On-chain custody protocol for AI agents on Solana. Spending caps, permission policies, and DeFi guardrails.

## Quick Start
- npm install @phalnx/sdk
- `createPhalnxTools(wallet, rpcUrl)` returns self-describing tools with Zod schemas
- Default plugin: "defi" (swap, deposit, withdraw, open_position, close_position, transfer)
- All plugins: "defi", "vault", "escrow", "policy", "market" (~15 tools total)

## SDK
- [API Reference](/sdk/typescript/src/index.ts): Full SDK exports
- [Tool Schemas](/sdk/typescript/src/create-tools.ts): Agent-facing tool definitions with Zod
- [IntentEngine](/sdk/typescript/src/intent-engine.ts): validate → precheck → execute pipeline
- [Error Codes](/sdk/typescript/src/agent-errors.ts): All 71 error codes with recovery actions

## Agent Integration
- `createPhalnxTools(wallet, rpcUrl, { plugins: ["defi"] })` → 6 self-describing tools
- Each tool has: name, description, Zod parameters schema, execute function
- Structured errors: category, retryable flag, recovery_actions with tool references
- Plugin scoping: load only the tools you need (defi/vault/escrow/policy/market)
- Permission scoping: disable specific tools via `permissions: { phalnx_swap: false }`

## Core Concepts
- Vault: PDA-controlled account that holds tokens and enforces policies
- Agent: Signing key registered on a vault with permission bitmask (21 action types)
- Composed Transaction: [validate_and_authorize, DeFi_instruction, finalize_session]
- Spending Cap: Rolling 24h window, stablecoin-denominated (USDC/USDT)
- Policy: Per-vault rules (daily cap, max tx size, leverage limit, protocol allowlist)

## Supported Protocols
- Jupiter V6 (swap, lend, earn, trigger orders, recurring orders)
- Flash Trade (perpetuals — up to 100x leverage)
- Drift Protocol (perpetuals, spot trading, lending)
- Kamino Finance (lending, borrowing)

## Error Handling
- 71 on-chain error codes (6000-6070) mapped to AgentError with recovery actions
- Categories: INPUT_VALIDATION, TRANSIENT, RATE_LIMIT, PERMISSION, RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND, SPENDING_CAP, POLICY_VIOLATION, FATAL
- `toAgentError(error)` converts any error to structured AgentError
- Retryable errors include `retry_after_ms` suggestion

## Architecture
- On-chain (Anchor/Rust): Protocol-agnostic financial guardrails
- SDK (TypeScript): Protocol-specific intelligence + agent-facing API
- TEE: Trust boundary for agent signing (Crossmint, Privy, Turnkey)
- Stablecoin-only USD tracking (no oracles)
